title: react-nouislider@1.14.2 breaks build 🚨
body:
Hello lovely humans, [react-nouislider](https://www.npmjs.com/package/react-nouislider) just published its new version 1.14.2.
State Failing tests :rotating_light:
Dependency react-nouislider
New version 1.14.2
Type dependency
This version is **covered** by your **current version range** and after updating it in your project **the build went from success to failure**. As react-nouislider is a direct dependency of this project **this is very likely breaking your project right now**. If other packages depend on you it’s very likely also breaking them. I recommend you give this issue a very high priority. I’m sure you can resolve this :muscle: Of course this could just be a false positive, caused by a flaky test suite, or third parties that are currently broken or unavailable, but that would be another problem I’d recommend working on. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 3 commits . - [`615758e`](https://github.com/algolia/react-nouislider/commit/615758e37232f30fd38489f2845048de1a8f5f0d) 1.14.2 - [`e896990`](https://github.com/algolia/react-nouislider/commit/e896990b652fa2a08b21dd124c1a00bfb38546a2) Merge pull request #32 from patrickdevivo/master - [`f883f33`](https://github.com/algolia/react-nouislider/commit/f883f33649f5d94724fca0aeaae4c6abda2ce24e) update connect PropTypes See the [full diff](https://github.com/algolia/react-nouislider/compare/b8ca7a61037b161dc497619741b9f03b11613193...615758e37232f30fd38489f2845048de1a8f5f0d). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/). Tired of seeing this sponsor message? :zap: `greenkeeper upgrade`
